qa_pairs.question: Who is required to submit an updated Canadian Common CV (CCV) when applying to a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: An updated Canadian Common CV (CCV) is required for both the Academic Principal Investigator (PI) and all co-Principal Investigators (co-PIs) when applying to a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC).

qa_pairs.question: Is it mandatory for an Academic Principal Investigator (PI) to submit a new Canadian Common CV (CCV) for a fall Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) if they already updated it in the spring?
qa_pairs.answer: No, it is not always mandatory. If an Academic Principal Investigator (PI) has already updated their Canadian Common CV (CCV) for Alliance account renewal in the spring, submitting a new CCV for a fall Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) is at the PI's discretion, especially if new information has been added since the spring.
